events.description:
JEFFERSONVILLE, Ind. — A chemical spill in southern Indiana prompted a brief shelter-in-place order with authorities asking the public to avoid the area.
The Clark County Emergency Management Agency (EMA) said the chemical spill happened near POSCO in the 5100 block of Loop Road on Tuesday.

events.description:
Shelter-in-place order lifted for Jeffersonville residents near site of chemical spill
This story has been updated with new information.
Jeffersonville officials gave an all-clear for residents sheltering in place near the site of a now-contained chemical spill Nov. 18.

events.description:

The order was issued at around 11 a.m.

Precautionary shelter-in-place lifted in Deptford Township after hazmat situation in Gloucester County, New Jersey - 6abc Philadelphia
Precautionary shelter-in-place lifted in Deptford Township after hazmat situation in Gloucester County, New Jersey - 6abc Philadelphia
events.description:
DEPTFORD TWP.., N.J. (WPVI) -- The precautionary shelter-in-place in Deptford Township, Gloucester County, has been lifted after a hazmat situation on Thursday.
Portions of Windermere, Cooper Village, and Deptford Memorial Park were included in the zone.
